messages.content:
Eres un experto en el codebase de ProjectSight (Trimble Construction).
El proyecto usa .NET/C# en el backend con ASP.NET MVC/Razor y Angular en el frontend.

Reglas críticas del proyecto (nunca las violes):
- Backend: Nunca uses ORM (Entity Framework, Dapper). Solo IDBHelper con stored procedures por nombre.
- Backend: Toda operación de BD va a través de stored procedures nombrados. Jamás inline SQL.
- Frontend: Nunca uses Angular HttpClient. Usa RxJS ajax() via APIBase / APIFactory.
- Frontend: Usa DestroyRef + subscribeTo() para subscriptions, NO Subscription arrays manuales.
- Frontend: Nunca hardcodees colores hex. Usa variables CSS de Default.css.
- No edites delta_procs.sql directamente; se genera automáticamente desde base_procs.sql.
- Agregar o quitar [UseInAPI] en una propiedad dispara APIClientComponentGenerator al compilar.

Cuando implementes cambios, sigue el patrón exacto del diff que se te proporciona.

```diff

+        /// <summary>
+        /// Retrieve Site Capture Processing / Upload Statuses for a given portfolio and project.
+        /// </summary>

+        /// <returns>A list of <see cref="MobileSiteCaptureState"/> describing the current processing/upload status for each Site Capture upload request.</returns>

+        [HttpGet]

+        public async Task<ProjectSightActionResult> SiteCaptureProcessingState(Guid portfolioGuid, int projectId, DateTimeOffset? dtLastSyncDateTime = null, CancellationToken cancellationToken = default)
+        {
+            // Used in 2.45.2 and newer

+            await ConfigureAccessForPortfolioDBUserAsync(portfolioGuid, projectId, cancellationToken: cancellationToken);
+
+            var error = new ErrorEncountered();
+
+            var captureSystem = new SiteCaptureUploadRequestSystem();
+
+            var result = captureSystem.GetUploadProc

server, support 50 character contact and approver names

diff --git a/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSiteCaptureState.cs b/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSiteCaptureState.cs
new file mode 100644
index 00000000000..78076a8fe27
--- /dev/null
+++ b/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSiteCaptureState.cs
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+﻿using System;
+using System.Collections.Generic;
+using System.Linq;
+using System.Text;
+using System.Threading.Tasks;
+
+namespace ProjectSight.Common.Components.Mobile
+{
+    public class MobileSiteCaptureState
+    {
+        public enum States
+        {
+            Exists = 0,
+            ProcessingFloorPlan = 1,
+            Waiting = 2,
+            ProcessingCapture = 3,
+            Failed = 4
+        }
+
+        public Guid UploadGuid { get; set; }
+        public States UploadState { get; set; }
+        public bool Uploaded { get; set; }
+        public DateTimeOffset LastModified { get; set; }
+    }
+}
diff --git a/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSyncPrep.cs b/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSyncPrep.cs

+++ b/Core/Common/Components/Mobile/MobileSyncPrep.cs
@@ -34,9 +34,14 @@ public MobileSyncPrep(IRequestedBy requestedBy, GainsightUserDetails userinfo)
                 // MobileCapability.AIDailyReport, // not all servers support ... 
                 // MobileCapability.UploadComplete, // when normal Photos use UploadComplete 
 
+                // Keep until April, 2027
                 MobileCapability.Support360,
+                MobileCapability.SiteCapture,
                 MobileCapability.Announce360,
                 MobileCapability.Names50,
+
+                // Keep until June, 2027
+                MobileCapability.SyncUploadStatus
             };
 
             User = new UserInfo(requestedBy, userinfo);

 Uninstaller.ps1

diff --git a/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql b/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
index 21a5aa4aa99..cc31fdda7b8 100644
--- a/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
+++ b/Core/SQL/base_procs_ignition.sql
@@ -5509,6 +5509,36 @@ AS
    WHERE Status = 0 and Locked = 1
 GO
 
+/****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_get_SiteCaptureProcessingStates ******/
+CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_SiteCaptureProcessingStates
+  @PortfolioId      uniqueidentifier,
+  @ProjectId        int,
+  @LastSyncDateTime datetimeoffset
+AS
+  SELECT CaptureGuid as UploadGuid,
+         Status as CaptureStatus,
+         Cast((CASE WHEN CaptureFileLocation IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS BIT) as Uploaded,
+         LastModified 
+    FROM SiteCaptureUploadRequests
+   WHERE PortfolioId = @PortfolioId
+     AND ProjectId = @ProjectID
+     AND LastModified >= @LastSyncDateTime
+
+   UNION
+   
+  SELECT CaptureGuid as UploadGuid,
+         Status as CaptureStatus,
+         Cast((CASE WHEN CaptureFileLocation IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END) AS BIT) as Uploaded,
+         LastModified 
+    FROM SiteCaptureUploadRequestsArchive 
+   WHERE PortfolioId = @PortfolioId
+     AND ProjectId = @ProjectID
+     AND LastModified >= @LastSyncDateTime;
+
+  -- Consider indexes on PortfolioId, ProjectId, LastModified for both tables if this query is slow
+  -- and it is expected to return a small number of records based on the LastSyncDateTime filter 
+GO
+
 /****** Object:  Stored Procedure s_enc_get_SiteCaptureUploadRequest_by_MayaCaptureId ******/
 CREATE PROCEDURE dbo.s_enc_get_SiteCaptureUploadRequest_by_MayaCaptureId
   @MayaCaptureId           nvarchar(36)
```
